sides.canvas: createFigmaEngine().compileComponentData rendered by the playground canvas renderer (vendored), deviceScaleFactor 2

scoring.pctExactUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0, includeAA true — every differing pixel
scoring.pctAAUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0.1, includeAA false — antialiased pixels excluded by the classifier
scoring.pctAAMasked: the AA point with BOTH sides' DOM text rects (+4 device px) removed from numerator and denominator
scoring.sizePolicy: content-trimmed crops center-padded onto the UNION canvas; a size delta stays in the diff (never cropped to match)

cells.note: CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 0% vs real ink 3.52% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; CANVAS SIDE BLANK — RENDERER DEFECT (verified in-page: svg computed 0x0): the icon svg is inlined with viewBox only, no width/height attributes, and an svg has no intrinsic size in a shrink-to-fit flex context — the glyph lays out at 0x0 and paints NOTHING; the low masked % is the blank-vs-thin-arc artifact, see the ink columns

CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 0% vs real ink 2.32% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; CANVAS SIDE BLANK — RENDERER DEFECT (verified in-page: svg computed 0x0): the icon svg is inlined with viewBox only, no width/height attributes, and an svg has no intrinsic size in a shrink-to-fit flex context — the glyph lays out at 0x0 and paints NOTHING; the low masked % is the blank-vs-thin-arc artifact, see the ink columns
